query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE corretorId = u.id) as leads_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contratos WHERE corretorId = u.id) as contratos_count
FROM users u
WHERE u.email LIKE '%@test.com' 
   OR u.email LIKE '%@teste.com' 
   OR u.email LIKE '%@exemplo.com'
ORDER BY u.id;
